case_title: DAVIDE PATERNO RESPONDENT VS. COURTNEY ORSBORN APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2004 - JUDGMENT AWARDED IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF DAVIDE PATERNO AND AGAINST APPELLANT/DEFENDANT COURTNEY ORSBORN IN THE PRINCIPAL SUM OF $1500.00 PLUS COSTS IN THE SUM OF $32.00. JUDGE: THERESA MOORE-JUDGE PRO TEM; CLERK: PARAM NATT; NOT REPORTED (D 525)

STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
